name: WF-900 Error Handler Canonical
description: Normalizes runtime failures, writes error events, and directs replay or remediation.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$json, error_context: { error_received_at: new Date().toISOString(), dossier_id: $json.dossier_id || 'DOSSIER-UNSPECIFIED', source_workflow: $json.source_workflow || 'UNKNOWN' } } }];

return [{ json: { ...$json, registry_lookup: { error_registry: 'registries/error_registry.yaml', workflow_registry: 'registries/workflow_registry.yaml', route_registry: 'registries/route_registry.yaml' } } }];
